title: 'Abiyda` #0028
definition:
Abida or Abidah = "my father knows"

 1) fourth son of Midian and grandson of Abraham by his wife
    Keturah (after Sarah died)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Abida or Abidah = "my father knows"

 1) fourth son of Midian and grandson of Abraham by his wife
    Keturah (after Sarah died)

    NASB:  my father took knowledge, a son of Midian
